programme.title: Bering Sea Gold (S9)
programme.desc: When the temperature plummets to a season low, Shawn fights frozen ground with steam heat. Kris' hot plan to beat the cold fizzles quickly. Vernon gambles on a new spot.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It’s their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown (S10)
programme.desc: With exclusive access to one of the Seven Wonders of the World, Josh unravels conspiracy theories about the pyramid and scans for secret passages.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes (S2)
programme.desc: Matt chases a rare copy of the Declaration of Independence in a jam-packed hoard and digs through a 4,000-square-foot chicken coop for vintage motorcycles.

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Parker unleashes chaos as the team tries to get four wash plants running. Tony splurges on a new wash plant to get more gold.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S10)
programme.desc: Sig welcomes their newest greenhorn: his daughter. After four generations of Hansen fishermen, the next in line is a woman.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S10)
programme.desc: While the rest of the fleet have their doubts about a woman's place on a crab boat, the Northwestern crew must train their new recruit, Mandy Hansen.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S10)
programme.desc: As the wintery Opilio season roars on, Sig puts Mandy at the helm in boat-crushing seas.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown (S10)
programme.desc: Josh joins a daring experiment to replicate the ancient pyramid build. First-of-their-kind 3D scans reveal an undiscovered void beneath the stone.

programme.title: 6000-LB. Shark
programme.desc: With reports of enormous fat white sharks appearing off the coast of New Zealand, scientists Tom Hird and Leigh de Necker set out to find one of these behemoths.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes (S2)
programme.desc: In a house packed with oddities, Matt finds megalodon teeth, tribal masks and Civil War bullets. The team struggles to make the kitchen functional again.

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Rick plows through Vegas Valley paydirt and makes a big score, but an obstacle threatens to stall him. Parker's four-plant blitz stumbles.

programme.title: Gold Rush (Specials) (S16)
programme.desc: Join us for a countdown of Gold Rush fans' top 10 favorite moments across fifteen seasons of Gold Rush. Which one will be Number One?

programme.desc: Dustin risks losing his claims as he battles equipment failure to hit bedrock and $100K in gold. Tensions between Dustin and Danielle boil over.

programme.title: The Matter of Facts - Disinformation versus Democracy
programme.desc: Disinformation campaigns prove shockingly innovative in this investigation of digital deception on the international stage - from Paris to the Philippines. We see how, when truth is under attack, democracy is weakened.

programme.title: The Mission - Episode 1
programme.desc: The Mission - Episode 1

programme.title: Art Works - Reuben Kaye, Daniel Riley
programme.desc: Namila checks out what's on at Heide; Reuben Kaye talks cabaret, community and catharsis; we talk to Daniel Riley, Australian Dance Theatre's first Indigenous Artistic Director; and meet Malian musician Viex Farka Toure.

programme.title: End Game with Tony Armstrong - Episode 2
programme.desc: Tony investigates how athlete activism can combat racism in sport, questioning why Australia often resists outspoken athletes like Adam Goodes.

programme.title: Alone Australia - Episode 7
programme.desc: One survivalist's body begins to shut down another is forced to reckon with their enemies and a wildlife encounter threatens another's chance at winning.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien - Episode 103
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: A Bite to Eat with Alice - Danielle Walker
programme.desc: Comedy writer Danielle Walker arrives with one of her favourite ingredients, soft tortillas. She also has a big challenge for Alice, can she get her back cooking with prawns?

programme.title: If you're Listening - Black Swans - Black Swans (Part 3) Burning Hill
programme.desc: In 1959 travel was getting faster and many expected we'd be routinely zipping to other planets in no time. But now, our transport is not much faster than it was back then, so why are we still so slow? (Part 3 of 4)

programme.title: ABC National News - Episode 145
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: 7.30 - Episode 81
programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: The Mission - Episode 1
programme.desc: The Mission - Episode 1

programme.title: The World - Episode 81
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: The Matter of Facts - Disinformation versus Democracy
programme.desc: Disinformation campaigns prove shockingly innovative in this investigation of digital deception on the international stage - from Paris to the Philippines. We see how, when truth is under attack, democracy is weakened.

programme.title: Planet America - Episode 17
programme.desc: As Trump steamrolls through the second year of his second term, Chas and John are here to guide you through the mayhem: covering Iran, ICE, tariffs, NATO, Russia/Ukraine, Gaza, affordability, Greenland, the midterms and more.

programme.title: The Pacific - Episode 10
programme.desc: The Pacific region is rich in culture, people and stories. Johnson Raela and Alice Lolohea bring you stories that matter to the Pacific and updated information from journalists with deep regional expertise. (Midseason Final)

programme.title: ABC Late News - Episode 103
programme.desc: End your day with the latest on the day's top stories. ABC News has reporters across Australia and around the globe to uncover what's happening and why it matters. Presented by Michael Tetlow in Perth.

programme.title: The Business - Episode 65
programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, employees and business owners big and small. Presented by Kirsten Aiken.

programme.desc: Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: The World - Episode 81
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: Canvas of Oceans
programme.desc: Canvas of Oceans is a story about preservation and a celebration of Pacific identity. Join Johnson Raela and Alice Lolohea in Hawaii as they meet with creators and custodians of culture at the 13th Festival of Pacific Arts.

programme.title: The Matter of Facts - Disinformation versus Democracy

programme.title: If you're Listening - Black Swans - Black Swans (Part 3) Burning Hill
programme.desc: In 1959 travel was getting faster and many expected we'd be routinely zipping to other planets in no time. But now, our transport is not much faster than it was back then, so why are we still so slow? (Part 3 of 4)

programme.title: The World - Episode 81
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 104
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 104
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings - Episode 104
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News at Noon - Episode 104
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Australian Story - Episode 14
programme.desc: In 2026, Logie-award-winning documentary program Australian Story celebrates 30 years sharing compelling stories about real people that illuminate, entertain and inspire. The power of the personal. Presented by Leigh Sales.

programme.title: Great Australian Walks - The Riesling Trail
programme.desc: Susie heads to South Australia's renowned wine region, walking the contours of a disused railway track from Auburn to Clare, while hearing stories of women's survival and tasting wine from the valley's first viticulturalists.

programme.title: Cat People
programme.desc: Nastassja Kinski stars in this erotic fantasy about a beautiful young woman who discovers love for the first time, only to find that the explosive experience brings tragic consequences.

programme.title: The Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A bounty hunter learns that his next target is his ex-wife.

programme.title: Salt
programme.desc: A beautiful CIA officer accused of being a Russian spy must go on the run to clear her name and identify a would-be presidential assassin.

programme.title: V for Vendetta
programme.desc: In a future Britain turned fascist, a masked vigilante known as “V” fights to free the nation. Teaming up with a young woman he rescues, they ignite a revolution against tyranny.

programme.title: Megamind
programme.desc: Super villain Megamind’s (Will Ferrell) dreams have come true when he conquers Metro Man (Brad Pitt) but when a new villain (Jonah Hill) runs rampant, can Megamind save the day?

programme.title: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: A brutally realistic tour de force chronicling the conflict between a corrupt labor boss and a crusading Catholic priest.

programme.title: Conspiracy Theory
programme.desc: Academy Award winners Julia Roberts and Mel Gibson team up for the first time in this taut thriller of a beautiful Justice Department attorney entangled in a paranoid cab driver's Conspiracy Theory.

programme.title: The Scorpion King
programme.desc: In a time of darkness and in the face of evil, one man dared to fight back. Utilising his combat skills as an assassin, a warrior defies an empire to become a legend and unite a nation.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Have the time of your life with Meryl Streep and an all-star cast in this undeniably fun celebration of mothers and daughters, old friends and newly found family!

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang kahalagahan ng mabuting paglilingkod ng mga namumuno sa pagsulong ng mga pangunahing hanapbuhay at pagtugon sa pangangailangan ng mga kasapi ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang tambalang salita, pandiwa, pang-abay, at pang-ukol. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng sariling ideya, hinuha, pangunahin at sumusuportang kaisipan, tungkol sa kuwentong napakinggan.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain at pahalagahan ang pagkakakilanlang kultural ng kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Discover how objects perform motion, and learn about the source of light, sound, heat and electricity, along with their uses.

programme.title: Grade 4 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano wastong gamitin ang mga pang-abay, pang-uri, pang-angkop, pangatnig, salitang naglalarawan. Aralin kung paano magsulat ng pangungusap, talata, at balita, at kung paano magsuri ng mga kuwento at mga pahayag.

programme.title: Grade 4 Math
programme.desc: Learn about parallel and perpendicular lines, angles, triangles, quadrilaterals, continuous and repeating patterns and number sentences, and the concept of time, perimeter, area, and volume.

programme.title: Grade 4 English
programme.desc: Learn what are adverbs, signal words, and graphic organizers, and how to analyze a story and infer the speaker's tone, mood and purpose.

programme.title: Grade 4 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain ang bahaging ginagampanan ng pamahalaan sa lipunan, mga pinuno at iba pang naglilingkod sa pagkakaisa, kaayusan at kaunlaran ng bansa.

programme.title: Grade 4 Science
programme.desc: Know more about forces that change the shape, size or movement of objects and how light, heat and sound travel using various media.

programme.title: Grade 7 Filipino
programme.desc: Maliwanagan kung ano ang suprasegmental, pagbubuod, pagsusuri at paghahambing ng iba't ibang uri ng panitikan, at kung paano gamitin ang angkop na pahayag at panadang anaporik at kataporik na pangngalan.

programme.title: Grade 7 Math
programme.desc: Identify the key concepts of geometry of shapes and sizes, and geometric relationships.

programme.title: Grade 7 English
programme.desc: Learn how to use multimedia resources and oral language when giving information, and how to express one's belief, cite evidence, and reign in thoughts in public forums.

programme.title: Grade 7 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang mga pagbabago, pag-unlad at pagpapatuloy sa Timog at Kanlurang Asya sa transisyonal at makabagong panahon (ika-16 hanggang ika-20 siglo).

programme.title: Grade 7 Science
programme.desc: Know more about motion in one dimension, waves as a carrier of energy, and the characteristics of light, alongside the different charging processes and how heat is transferred.

programme.title: Preschool | ECCD
programme.desc: Learn about the concept of size, length, weight, time, and money. Study how children can take care of themselves and understand the objects in the environment and their attributes.

programme.title: Kindergarten
programme.desc: Learn about the concept of size, length, weight, time, and money. Study how children can take care of themselves and understand the objects in the environment and their attributes.

programme.title: Grade 1 Language

The two sisters plan to meet after the mission, but Yinxi fails to show up unbeknownst to Yinchen, Yinxi is being pursued by a mysterious killer...

programme.title: The Blood of Youth - EP 5 少年歌行

On their journey, they meet Tang Lian who is a disciple of the Tang sect. Together, the group of youths embark on an adventure.

Her gifts bring her to the attention of Emperor Qi, who takes her as his bride in order to help him manage the kingdom.
